name: tradeguard-ai
description: AI Stock Risk Manager — LLM orchestration, ML signals, RAG, and Robinhood MCP execution guardrails

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.setup:api: cd apps/api && python -m venv .venv && . .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
